title: Soborbo event-gateway per-site KV config
description: Formal schema for the SITE_CONFIG KV value the gateway worker reads per hostname. The gads.conversion_actions enum is GENERATED from events.json (CANONICAL names only — the ingress canonicalizes legacy aliases before the lookup, so legacy-keyed maps never match at runtime); server/generate-site.mjs guards drift between this enum and events.json. Model 2 / Run 6: the gateway sends NO GA4 (on-site GA4 is browser-owned, the offline GA4 leg is disabled) — the ga4 block is diagnostics-only. gads is Google-Ads-offline-only via the Data Manager API. meta.test_event_code MUST NOT be set in production KV (edge-cached config has twice routed real conversions into Meta's Test stream); the sanctioned test mechanism is the per-request code.

crm_token_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex of the per-site server-ingress token. Authorizes the site backend on /api/event/conversion-server and the CRM on /api/event/lead-status. Generated by generate-site.mjs; the plaintext lives only in crm-secret.env / deploy secrets.

test_event_code.description: FORBIDDEN in production KV (generator hard-errors without --allow-test-event-code). The edge-cached config has twice routed real conversions into Meta's Test stream. Use the per-request test code (TRACKING_TEST_LEAD_EMAIL keying) instead.

ga4.description: LEGACY / diagnostics-only. The gateway sends NO GA4: on-site GA4 is browser-owned (GTM), and the offline GA4 leg is disabled (without a real client_id every event would start a synthetic GA4 client). Only /debug-ga4 and old-DLQ retries read this. Omit for new sites.

gads.description: Google-Ads-OFFLINE-only (Model 2): Enhanced Conversions for Leads via the Data Manager API, posted from /api/event/lead-status. conversion_actions keys are typically the OFFLINE CRM events (lead_qualified, booking_confirmed, revenue_confirmed, …).

conversion_actions.description: event_name -> numeric Data Manager conversion action / productDestinationId. Keys (enum) GENERATED from events.json: CANONICAL names only (legacy GA4 aliases are dead config — the ingress canonicalizes before the lookup).
